items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm

Model: 26599

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining needs to be sewn inside out during production, so the leather requirements are extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, finally presenting this boutique to everyone 💪💪 Size: 20cm, Model No. 26599

【VOLTAIRE 】24 New Voltaire Mini Ellipse Shoulder Bag! Super chic minimalist design, showcasing the ultimate YSL French style and a very authentic vintage feel. Suitable for hand or shoulder carry. The front flap features a novel LE CASSANDRE turn-lock. The leather-lined bag with bronze hardware is simple and elegant. This is the simplest way to get one.
Item No.: S8098
Size: 21×11×4.5cm

 #Loulou puffer#Medium 29CM🐑Quilted Sheepskin Bag, made from original factory authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes use gold-plated matte silver hardware, the bag opening folds and uses a magnetic four-buckle closure, excellent sealing and security; inside features a zippered pocket for phone and valuables, no extra pockets otherwise, use it freely! Size: 29x17x11cm
